summary: Role-based Routing (Step 1.5) - ALL TESTS PASSED. Frontend role-based routing, sidebars, and route guards all working correctly. Director → /mission-control (with Roster), Coach → /mission-control (NO Roster), Athlete → /board with athlete-specific sidebar. Route guards prevent cross-role access.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js: getHomeRoute() correctly routes director/coach to /mission-control, athlete/parent to /board
ProtectedRoute: allowedRoles prop works correctly with role-based redirect via getHomeRoute()
Sidebar.js: getNavItems(role) returns correct nav arrays - STAFF_NAV for coach, STAFF_NAV + DIRECTOR_EXTRA for director, ATHLETE_NAV for athlete/parent
AthleteComingSoonPage.js: Clean placeholder with dynamic title/icon based on route using PAGE_META lookup
LoginPage.js: Role selector with Athlete/Parent/Coach buttons, default role is athlete
seed_data_creation: Created test.athlete.routing@test.com during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based routing verified for Step 1.5. Features tested: (1) Director login → /mission-control with sidebar showing Dashboard, Events, Advocacy, Program, Roster, AI Features. (2) Coach login → /mission-control with sidebar showing Dashboard, Events, Advocacy, Program, AI Features - NO Roster. (3) Registration form role selector shows Athlete, Parent, Coach buttons. (4) Athlete registration → /board with sidebar showing Dashboard, Pipeline, Schools, Calendar, Inbox, Profile, Analytics, Settings. (5) Athlete route guard: /mission-control redirects to /board. (6) Director route guard: /board redirects to /mission-control. (7) AthleteComingSoonPage shows 'Coming in Phase 2' with correct page title based on route.

director_login_redirect.details: Director redirected to /mission-control with full staff sidebar + Roster

coach_login_redirect.details: Coach redirected to /mission-control, sidebar has staff nav but NO Roster

registration_role_selector.details: Create Account tab shows role selector with Athlete, Parent, Coach buttons

athlete_registration_redirect.details: Athlete registration → /board with athlete-specific sidebar (8 items)

pipeline_coming_soon.details: /pipeline shows 'Pipeline' title and 'Coming in Phase 2' message

schools_coming_soon.details: /schools shows 'Schools' title and 'Coming in Phase 2' message

role_badge_display.details: Sidebar shows role badge (DIRECTOR/COACH/ATHLETE) with user name
